title: Opinion: Opinion | From Colombo To Dhaka  And Male, Pumps Are Running Dry And New Delhi Is Answering
summary_full: The war in the Middle East has done in weeks what a decade of infrastructure diplomacy could not - it has made India's neighbours remember who answers the phone.
summary_public: The war in the Middle East has done in weeks what a decade of infrastructure diplomacy could not - it has made India's neighbours remember who answers the phone.
